acceptance_targets: [CH05-B-001] PASS if the revised spans around snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_05.md:225, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_05.md:297, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_05.md:331 each end with a different irreversible state change; FAIL if two or more of those sections still resolve as warning-plus-continued-training without a new constraint.

[CH05-C-001] PASS if each targeted span contains complete sentences with explicit subject-verb structure and no bare metric fragment standing alone; FAIL if fragmentary scorecard syntax remains in those lines.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if the revised spans around snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_05.md:225, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_05.md:297, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_05.md:331 each end with a different irreversible state change; FAIL if two or more of those sections still resolve as warning-plus-continued-training without a new constraint.
findings.problem: The chapter runs three consecutive push-through-pain sequences with near-identical decision logic (warning, denial, continued load). Escalation is present, but the middle training block and the late-night block partially duplicate function, reducing structural torque before the final notebook falsification beat.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rebuild the middle-to-late training architecture at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_05.md:225, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_05.md:273, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_05.md:331, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_05.md:345 so each block changes Anika's available choices. Keep one coach-argument loop, then make the next scene produce a distinct new consequence (institutional, relational, or bodily) rather than another variation of the same refusal.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if each targeted span contains complete sentences with explicit subject-verb structure and no bare metric fragment standing alone; FAIL if fragmentary scorecard syntax remains in those lines.
findings.problem: Narration repeatedly drops into clipped, note-like fragments (direction labels and scorecard shorthand). This violates the constitution's anti-elliptical-clipping rule and starts reading like drill notation instead of lived prose at key stress peaks.
findings.rewrite_direction: At snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_05.md:29, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_05.md:335, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_05.md:337, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_05.md:363, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_05.md:367, convert fragment clusters into grammatically complete narration while preserving urgency through cadence, punctuation, and breath-level sentence length.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

revision_pass.focus: Prioritize structural and craft blockers first: causality, chapter architecture, stakes clarity, continuity logic, and all HIGH/CRITICAL defects.
revision_pass.label: HIGH/CRITICAL structural/craft fixes

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into uncomfortable specificity when it changes behavior: pain detail, debt arithmetic, manipulative care, and mixed motives. In edge cases, prefer the truest in-character action over protective narration, then carry the real consequence forward instead of immediately moralizing it away.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If coercion, grief, injury, or economic shame appears, language must stay specific and embodied; vague softening triggers mandatory rewrite.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: High - contractions are the spoken default; uncontracted forms are reserved for formal authority, deliberate emphasis, or emotional freezing.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Vary scene count and dialogue density chapter to chapter: rotate match compression, slow inventory aftermath, institutional pressure scenes, and quiet domestic intervals so adjacent chapters do not share the same structural pulse.
prose_style_profile.diction: Concrete contemporary diction with class-aware specificity; avoid abstract therapy language unless a character would actually use it.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: Close third anchored in Anika for most chapters, with brief controlled slips toward Ravi in designated confrontation and aftermath chapters.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Alternate clipped athletic sequences with longer reflective cadences; sentence length should track exertion, shame, and release.
